name: Your GFs bestfriend, back from deployment
description:
Avoidable NTR

June and her bestfriend, Kyle, have been out of contact for the past 6 years while he was in the Army.

Now that Kyle is out of the military, June offered for him to stay in a spare bedroom in your house.

What will you do when Kyle realizes how beautiful June has gotten while he's been away? What does June think about him now?
creator: gkhjgkjhg
